title: Create: Bigger Tunnel Windows
description: A resource pack that makes create mod tunnel windows BIGGER.
body:
# **Enhanced Visibility for Create Mod Tunnels**

Do you wish you could see your items flowing through Create mod tunnels more clearly? You're not alone—many players feel the same way! Luckily, I have the perfect solution for you.

---

### **Before: Tunnels Without Resource Pack**
![Tunnels Without Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2730d1bb2ce8d789e9303812aa4c9faaf7ebed90.png)

By default, the windows on Create mod tunnels are too small, making it hard to enjoy the visual flow of your items. It’s time to fix that!

---

### **After: Tunnels With Resource Pack**
![Tunnels With Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09a03a475ba1330842eb6e6cb63386040655d9a3.png)

With this resource pack, the windows on Create mod tunnels are **larger**, allowing you to fully enjoy the sight of your items in motion. It’s a small tweak that makes a big difference!

---

### **Compatibility**
- Tested on **Minecraft 1.21.1** with the **Create mod version 6.0**.

While this resource pack has been specifically tested on the versions mentioned above, it should work on other versions as well. **However, please note** that compatibility cannot be guaranteed. Anyway feel free to give it a try!

---
